name: A664InitPayload
title: A664InitPayload
description: The payload section (excluding sequence number) of an AFDX message is set using the current Tx-values of the internal signal list. These are typically set by CAPL signal value assignments, panels, signal generators, start value etc.
The message must be defined in the database and must contain signals (no protocol oriented types).

parameters.name: aMessage
parameters.description: the message object to be initialized
